Test Title: Loading state shows ""Loading marketplace..."" while data fetches
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe before models load
Expected Result: Centered text ""Loading marketplace..."" is displayed while modelsLoading or contentLoading is true

Test Title: Page header renders H1 ""AI Model Marketplace""
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe the top header section
Expected Result: H1 ""AI Model Marketplace"" is visible in bold Syne font

Test Title: Header subtitle shows model count dynamically
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe the subtitle below H1
Expected Result: Subtitle reads ""Discover and compare {N}+ AI models from leading providers"" where N matches the loaded catalog count

Test Title: Type filter chip bar renders with FILTER label and chips
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe the row below the header
Expected Result: FILTER:"" label followed by horizontally scrollable type chip buttons is visible"

Test Title: Active type chip has accent background and white text
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe the initially selected type chip
Expected Result: Active chip has accent background + white text + accent border; inactive chips have bg + text2

Test Title: Left sidebar renders four filter sections
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe the left sidebar (240px)
Expected Result: Four sections visible: Search / Sort By / Provider / Min Rating / Max Price

Test Title: Search input renders with placeholder ""Model name or keyword...""
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe the Search section in the sidebar
Expected Result: Input field visible with placeholder ""Model name or keyword..."""

Test Title: Sort By section shows three radio options
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe the Sort By section in the sidebar
Expected Result: Three radio buttons visible: ""Top Rated"" / ""Lowest Price"" / ""Most Reviews""

Test Title: Top Rated"" sort is selected by default
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe Sort By radio state
Expected Result: Top Rated"" radio button is checked on initial load"

Test Title: Provider section lists ""All"" plus all unique provider labs
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe Provider section in sidebar
Expected Result: All"" is first; remaining labs are listed as radio buttons sorted alphabetically"

Test Title: All"" provider radio is selected by default
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe Provider radio state
Expected Result: Radio "All" is checked on initial load

Test Title: Min Rating slider renders from 0 to 5 with step 0.1
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe Min Rating section
Expected Result: Range input with min=0 max=5 step=0.1 is visible; label reads ""Min Rating: 0.0"" by default

Test Title: Max Price slider renders from 0 to 20 with step 0.5
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe Max Price section
Expected Result: Range input with min=0 max=20 step=0.5 visible; label reads ""Max Price: $20/1M tk"" by default

Test Title: Result count label shows ""{N} models found""
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe label above the model grid
Expected Result: Label reads ""{N} models found"" where N matches the filtered result count

Test Title: Model grid uses auto-fill layout with min card width 280px
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe the card grid layout
Expected Result: Cards are arranged in auto-fill grid columns; each card is at least 280px wide

Test Title: Each model card shows icon name org rating description tags price and reviews
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe any model card
Expected Result: Card contains: colored icon / model name + badge / org / rating / truncated description / up to 3 tags / price / review count

Test Title: Model description is truncated to 85 characters with ellipsis
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Find a model with a long description
Expected Result: Description text is cut at 85 chars and ends with ""...""

Test Title: Each card shows Details and Use in Chat buttons
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Observe card footer buttons
Expected Result: Two buttons visible per card: ""Details"" (outlined) and ""Use in Chat"" (accent filled)

Test Title: Grid shows at most 100 cards regardless of total results
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace with no filters
2. Count visible cards
Expected Result: Maximum of 100 model cards are rendered in the grid

Test Title: Showing 100 of N"" message appears when results exceed 100
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Ensure filters return more than 100 results
Expected Result: Text ""Showing 100 of {N} models. Use filters to narrow results."" appears below the grid

Test Title: Typing in search input filters cards by model name
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Type a known model name in Search
Expected Result: Only cards whose name contains ""claude"" (case-insensitive) are shown; result count updates

Test Title: Search input filters by model description keyword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Type a keyword that appears in model descriptions
Expected Result: Cards whose description contains ""vision"" are shown; others are hidden

Test Title: Search input filters by org/provider name
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Type a provider name in Search
Expected Result: Cards whose org matches ""Anthropic"" are shown

Test Title: Search is case-insensitive
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Type the same term in upper and lower case
Expected Result: Both searches return the same set of cards

Test Title: Clearing search input restores all models
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Type in Search
3. Clear the field
Expected Result: All models (subject to other filters) are shown after clearing search

Test Title: No results shows ""0 models found"" in result count
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Type a search term with no matches
Expected Result: Label reads "0 models found"; grid is empty

Test Title: Clicking a type chip filters models to that type
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Click any non-"All" type chip
Expected Result: Only models whose types array includes the selected chip key are shown; result count updates

Test Title: Clicking the active type chip again does not deactivate it
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Click the currently active type chip
Expected Result: Chip remains active; filter remains applied

Test Title: Selecting a provider radio filters models to that lab
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Select a specific provider radio in the sidebar
Expected Result: Only models with lab matching the selected provider are shown

Test Title: Selecting ""All"" provider radio restores all providers
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Select a provider radio
3. Select "All"
Expected Result: Provider filter is cleared; models from all labs are shown again

Test Title: Min Rating slider updates label live as slider moves
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Drag Min Rating slider to 3.5
Expected Result: Label updates to ""Min Rating: 3.5"" as slider is dragged

Test Title: Min Rating filter hides models below the selected rating
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Set Min Rating slider to 4.5
Expected Result: Only models with rating >= 4.5 are shown; lower-rated models are hidden

Test Title: Max Price slider updates label live as slider moves
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Drag Max Price slider to 5.0
Expected Result: Label updates to ""Max Price: $5/1M tk"" as slider is dragged

Test Title: Max Price filter hides paid models above the selected price
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Set Max Price slider to $2
Expected Result: Models with price_start > 2 are hidden; models with price_start = 0 (free) always remain

Test Title: Free models (price_start = 0) are never filtered out by Max Price slider
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Set Max Price slider to $0
Expected Result: Models with price_start = 0 still appear in results regardless of Max Price value

Test Title: Selecting ""Top Rated"" sort orders cards by rating descending
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Select "Top Rated" radio
3. Observe card order
Expected Result: Cards are ordered from highest rating to lowest

Test Title: Selecting ""Lowest Price"" sort orders cards by price ascending
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Select "Lowest Price" radio
Expected Result: Cards are ordered from lowest price_start to highest

Test Title: Selecting ""Most Reviews"" sort orders cards by reviews descending
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Select "Most Reviews" radio
Expected Result: Cards are ordered from most reviews to fewest

Test Title: Multiple filters combine with AND logic
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Set Provider to a specific lab
3. Set Min Rating to 4.0
4. Type a keyword in Search
Expected Result: Only cards matching all three conditions simultaneously are shown

Test Title: Use in Chat"" card button navigates to /chat?model={id}
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Click "Use in Chat" on any model card
Expected Result: Browser navigates to /chat?model={model.id} for the clicked card

Test Title: Details"" card button opens model modal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Click "Details" on any model card
Expected Result: Modal appears centered with backdrop overlay; shows selected model details

Test Title: Modal header shows icon name org context and tags
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Open model modal via Details button
Expected Result: Modal header contains: 52×52 icon / model name / ""by {org} | {context}"" / badge / up to 4 tags / × button

Test Title: Modal renders four tabs: Overview Pricing Reviews How to Use
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /marketplace
2. Open any model modal
Expected Result: Four tab buttons visible: Overview / Pricing / Reviews / How to Use; Overview is active by default

Test Title: Overview tab shows full description and 6-stat grid
Test Steps:
1. Open model modal
2. Ensure Overview tab is active
Expected Result: Full description text + 3-column grid with Rating / Reviews / Context / Pricing / Provider / Types

Test Title: Pricing tab shows price card and description text
Test Steps:
1. Open model modal
2. Click Pricing tab
Expected Result: Accent-lt price card with ""per 1M tokens (blended)"" label + pricing description paragraph is shown

Test Title: Reviews tab shows three review cards with user rating and text
Test Steps:
1. Open model modal
2. Click Reviews tab
Expected Result: Three review cards visible: Developer / Data Scientist / Product Manager each with rating and review text

Test Title: How to Use tab shows API code snippet
Test Steps:
1. Open model modal
2. Click How to Use tab
Expected Result: Code block showing POST /api/chat/send with modelId pre-filled for the selected model is visible

Test Title: Clicking the backdrop overlay closes the modal
Test Steps:
1. Open model modal
2. Click outside the modal (on the dark overlay)
Expected Result: Modal closes; overlay disappears

Test Title: Clicking × button closes the modal
Test Steps:
1. Open model modal
2. Click the × button in modal header
Expected Result: Modal closes

Test Title: Use in Chat Hub ->"" in modal footer navigates to /chat?model={id} and closes modal
Test Steps:
1. Open model modal
2. Click "Use in Chat Hub ->" button in modal footer
Expected Result: Modal closes and browser navigates to /chat?model={selectedModel.id}
